title: Crispy Filipino Cheese Roast
description: Savory, crispy chicken breasts stuffed with cottage cheese and mozzarella, coated in a crunchy almond flour crust for a low‑carb date‑night delight.
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper or lightly oil it.
Place each chicken breast between two sheets of parchment and pound to an even thickness of about ¾ inch.
In a bowl, combine the cottage cheese, mozzarella, spinach, basil (if using), salt, and pepper. Mix until well blended.
Slice a pocket into each breast horizontally, being careful not to cut all the way through, and stuff generously with the cheese mixture. Secure with toothpicks if needed.
Whisk the beaten egg in a shallow dish. In another dish, mix the almond flour with garlic powder and smoked paprika.
Dip each stuffed breast first in the egg, then coat thoroughly with the almond flour mixture, pressing to adhere.
Place the coated breasts on the prepared baking sheet. Drizzle with 1 tbsp olive oil and brush the tops with the remaining 1 tbsp.
Bake for 25–30 minutes, until the chicken reaches 165°F internal temperature and the coating is golden and crisp.
Remove from oven, discard toothpicks, and let rest 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve with a green salad or a low-carb side such as cauliflower rice. Garnish with extra basil or grated Parmesan if desired.
